content: A novel episodic planning agent can be constructed that uses 2024-2025 SOTA active learning memory principles to dynamically prune and curate its episodic memory library based on curiosity-driven surprise signals, retaining only high-information past trajectories that improve long-horizon planning. This architecture eliminates the common problem of catastrophic planning interference from crowded, low-value episodic memory stores that plagues conventional fixed-capacity episodic agents.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
trigger_topic: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
